quote: Six plasmacytoid-variant bladder tumors were initially analyzed by whole exome sequencing... 19 additional plasmacytoid-variant tumors... 6 plasmacytoid-variant tumors profiled with the CLIA-certified MSK-IMPACT 341-gene panel
truncating somatic alterations in the CDH1 gene occur in 84% of plasmacytoid carcinomas
frequent mutations in the tumor suppressors TP53 and RB1
